title: Summer Plans at UKMP Pending as Response to COVID-19 Evolves
summary: In response to the COVID-19 global pandemic, NANA and Ambler Metals are working to determine how a summer field season at the Upper Kobuk Mineral Projects (UKMP) may progress while protecting communities and balancing job opportunities for residents of the region.
